G01.note: circ should be perpendicular to the neck tube, not the floor

G02.note: should be smoother, its creating a V both in the front and back

G10.note: curve it up towards the neck sides. it should be the same as G01 but cut off at the neck sides

H05.note: should go down on top of the body, not through the inside

H06.note: the line from neck to bust apex is still cutting the bust. the second line from apex to waist should follow the same angle as the first line but down to touch G07

H14.note: its still cutting into the bust (should sit on top) and it should go straight down from the neck to touch G04

H15.note: should go straight down the front to touch G03

H16.note: should go at an angle towarst the apex to touch G03

H17.note: should go around the shoulder then from armscye straight down to touch G07

H23.note: it should sit on top of the body, not inside it

H25.note: the lowbust point should be at the same X on G05 as the waist center back, then down to waist CB

H27.note: measurement should sit on top of the body, not inside

H28.note: measurement should sit on top of the body, not inside

H32.note: go down the side from the waist side to touch G08

H35.note: measure from waist side along the side seam to touch G09

H39.note: vertical line from shoulder point up to Y value of neck side

H41.note: should sit on top of the body, not inside

I03.note: the height of the across chest line is at 2/3 way between neck front point and the CF point on G03. use the X value for the neck front as CF

I07.note: straight from shoulder tip to shoulder tip

I08.note: measure halfway level between neck point at the back (use X as center back axis) and G03 level

I09.note: should be on top of the body not inside

I13.note: should be on top of the body not inside

J02.note: should be on top of the body not inside

J04.note: should move in straight from apex to touch G07, not straight down to the floor

J10.note: should be on top of the body not inside

K01.note: should be on top of the body not inside

K02.note: should be on top of the body not inside

K03.note: should be on top of the body not inside

K10.note: touch G04 at side seam (use depth of underarm point)

K13.note: touch G04 at side seam (use depth of underarm point)

L11.note:
circ perpendicular to arm, not parallel to the floor
also this should be measured around the arm at underarm point

L13.note: circ perpendicular to arm, not parallel to the floor

L15.note: circ perpendicular to arm, not parallel to the floor

L16.note: touch L11 down the arm from shoulder tip

M02.note: use geodesic curve from waist side to hip side, then straight to floor

P01.note: should touch G04 at center front axis

P09.note: should curve down from armfold to touch G04 at center front
